a:r.a:t: Top 5 Up & Top 5 Down — Average Order Value (£)
Concentration: Growth is concentrated among [X] publishers — top movers account for a disproportionate share of YoY movement.
Risk Area: Validate decline publishers — assess whether drops reflect seasonal patterns, de-prioritisation, or structural disengagement.
CPS Note: As this program operates on a CPS model, clicks growth without corresponding sales uplift should be assessed for conversion quality and incrementality — not framed as budget waste.
